chapters.title: Price Limit Review
chapters.summary: Scanned 1496 instruments. Found 13 issue(s) across 4 rules.

rule_blocks.title: Buffer Too Tight
rule_blocks.description: Flags instruments where the EMA-derived limit price is already breaching or very close to the Y cap boundary, indicating the buffer is too tight for current market conditions.

rule_blocks.title: Asymmetric Basis
rule_blocks.description: Flags perp instruments where the EMA basis is large relative to the Z cap, suggesting the cap should be widened on one side to accommodate the persistent premium/discount.

rule_blocks.title: Asset-Type Consistency
rule_blocks.description: Checks whether each instrument's Y/Z caps are consistent with the standard ranges for its asset type classification.

rule_blocks.title: Z Cap <= Y Cap
rule_blocks.description: The Z (index) cap must always be strictly greater than the Y (limit) cap. If Z <= Y the price limit hierarchy is broken.
